summary: Completed testing of 3 new admin features for КУПЕЛИ section. All features verified working: 1) Admin sub-tabs in КУПЕЛИ > Контент (Hero, Карточки Dlaczego, Промо-блоки, Порядок блоков, Исключения опций), 2) Section order reordering with up/down arrows, 3) Option exclusions showing ALL 6 products (not just 3 with api_model_id). Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: FEATURE: Admin > КУПЕЛИ > Контент has 5 sub-tabs: Hero, Карточки Dlaczego, Промо-блоки, Порядок блоков, Исключения опций
FEATURE: Карточки Dlaczego tab shows 3 feature cards, 4 option cards, 4 badge cards with editable fields
FEATURE: Each card has icon selector, title input, description input, and active toggle
FEATURE: Порядок блоков tab shows all 13 sections with up/down arrow reordering
FEATURE: Section order includes: hero, features, products, installment, colors, options, schematic, stove, about, gallery, configurator, testimonials, contact
BUGFIX: Исключения опций tab shows ALL 6 products (not just 3 with api_model_id)
BUGFIX: Products shown: Okrągła 200cm, Okrągła 225cm, Kwadratowa 170x200cm, Kwadratowa 220x220cm, Kwadratowa 245x245cm, Balia do schłodzenia
API: GET /api/balia/content returns promo_features, promo_options, promo_badges, section_order fields
API: POST /api/balia/content saves all content fields with admin auth
API: GET /api/balia/products returns all 6 products with 'id' field
API: Products use product.id for exclusion lookup (not api_model_id)
API: POST /api/balia/option-exclusions saves exclusions for products without api_model_id
Balie landing page loads correctly with all sections
BalieLandingPage renders sections in order from section_order field
BalieFeatures component loads promo_features, promo_options, promo_badges from API
critical_code_review_comments: BaliaContentAdmin.jsx correctly implements 5 sub-tabs with data-testid attributes
Section order uses DEFAULT_SECTIONS array with 13 sections
Exclusions tab iterates over products array (all 6 products) instead of filtering by api_model_id
BalieProducts.jsx uses product.id for exclusion lookup: exclusions?.[product.id]
BalieLandingPage.jsx dynamically renders sections based on section_order from API
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested 3 new admin features: 1) Admin sub-tabs in КУПЕЛИ > Контент with 5 tabs (Hero, Карточки Dlaczego, Промо-блоки, Порядок блоков, Исключения опций), 2) Section order reordering with 13 sections, 3) Option exclusions showing ALL 6 products. Key change: exclusion lookup changed from product.api_model_id to product.id, so all products appear in exclusions tab regardless of whether they have api_model_id set. Admin sidebar: САУНЫ group should be collapsed first, then КУПЕЛИ group visible. Tab data-testid: admin-tab-balia_content. Sub-tabs have data-testid: balia-content-tab-{hero|features_edit|promo_blocks|section_order|exclusions}.

admin_sub_tabs.details: 5 sub-tabs in КУПЕЛИ > Контент: Hero, Карточки Dlaczego, Промо-блоки, Порядок блоков, Исключения опций

features_edit_tab.details: Shows 3 feature cards, 4 option cards, 4 badge cards with icon/title/desc/active fields

section_order_tab.details: Shows 13 sections with up/down arrows for reordering. Hero always first, Contact always last.

exclusions_tab.details: Shows ALL 6 products: Okrągła 200cm, Okrągła 225cm, Kwadratowa 170x200cm, Kwadratowa 220x220cm, Kwadratowa 245x245cm, Balia do schłodzenia

api_content_fields.details: GET /api/balia/content returns promo_features, promo_options, promo_badges, section_order

exclusion_key_change.details: Exclusion lookup changed from api_model_id to product.id - all 6 products now appear in exclusions
